svg.title: Stock & POS System Architecture Overview
svg.desc: Full-stack architecture showing Frontend Next.js, Backend Spring Boot, Go Batch, PostgreSQL, and supporting services

g.text: Browser / Desktop (React + Next.js 14 App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind + shadcn/ui)
Spring Web · Spring Security · JWT · Spring Data JPA · Swagger/OpenAPI · Flyway
Flyway migration · Optimistic/Pessimistic locking · Row-level lock · NUMERIC for money · Asia/Bangkok timezone
Import CSV/Excel · Export Report · Generate Summary
CLI commands · Retry · Logging · Job status tracking
No negative stock · Sale + stock deduct in same TX · Optimistic lock · NUMERIC money · Audit log on every TX · Idempotency key
